title: agrostis rigidula subsp. arisan-montana
intro: Agrostis rigidula subsp. arisan-montana is a sub-species of the Agrostis rigidula plant, commonly referred to as a type of grass, typically found in mountainous regions of Taiwan. It has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Agrostis rigidula subsp. arisan-montana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
